cards.back: A method of searching and retrieving structured data from large amounts of unstructured text

cards.front: What is the key concept of structured text retrieval?
cards.back: Structuring power, which refers to the ability to extract meaningful information from text

cards.front: What was one of the early text retrieval models?
cards.back: Postel's algorithm, which used a simple keyword matching system
A technique for searching and retrieving data from XML documents

cards.front: What is the purpose of XML retrieval evaluation?
cards.back: To assess the effectiveness of XML retrieval systems and models
